summary: This bundle records deterministic proof for the remaining command, packet, grouping, status, adapter, live-run, and optimize provenance claims that already have focused tests.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only checked command, packet, grouping, status, adapter, live-run, and optimize provenance behavior covered by the listed tests is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: The skill or a human reviewer corrected every semantic edge case
A live product instance completed a real external app run
Any possible evidence ref satisfied a claim without review
Optimization produced a better prompt or adapter

notableAssertions: adapter audience_hints override portable path defaults and semantic_groups label claim review queues
possible evidence refs remain hints and do not satisfy claims
claim status summary exposes satisfied evidence and action buckets for claims needing scenarios, tests, alignment, or existing evidence
skill-facing scan bound display prose routes to dev/skill instead of deterministic proof debt
explicit instance_discovery normalizes to a workbench instance catalog without requiring a probe command
eval live run writes one cautilus.live_run_invocation_result.v1 packet to the requested output_file
stdout points at the written result file
generateOptimizeProposal turns explicit evidence into one bounded revision plan
each prioritized evidence item carries provenance.packet and provenance.locator

decision.reason: Focused Go and Node tests prove the deterministic adapter hints, explicit instance discovery, live-run result output, possible-evidence non-satisfaction, grouping hints, status/action summary, and optimize provenance behavior for the listed claims.
